title: Do You Like "Big Girls"?
overview: Tall Kaori and short Sota are siblings by marriage. One day, commanded by Kaori, Sota becomes the dorm manager and coach for her university women's volleyball team. Among the members is Ayano, his first love, and they have an unexpected reunion! Sota begins living together with the club members as the dorm manager. But that night, he witnesses an unexpected side of Ayano, whom he's always admired...?!

title: The Target! All Eyes On Sota
overview: Kaori, who had suggested the date herself, becomes flustered upon learning that Sota and Ayano went to a hotel. Still, as Sota's sister, she tries to mediate between them... Meanwhile, Sakura, Kyoka, and Yuria, having heard the whole story, come up with a bizarre theory: Since they're also members of the girls' volleyball club like Ayano, they should have the right to do the same thing! And so, they begin seducing Sota!

title: Do You Like Tiny Girls Too?
overview: Everyone is present at the girls' dormitory, now with the club president, Sanae, who had been absent for a while due to family circumstances, returning to the volleyball club. Sanae, a libero specializing in defense, is petite despite being on the volleyball team, and Sota finds himself drawn to her, who is shorter than him. The group decides to hold a Genghis Khan party to celebrate Sanae's return and Sota's appointment as coach. But that night, an unexpected hint of romance awaited Sota!

title: The Cherry Blossom Season... The Pure-Hearted Girl with Glasses
overview: Sakura is always full of jokes. One day, when Sota tells her that she'd be cute if she just acted normal, a certain memory resurfaces. Back in elementary school, Sakura, already tall for her age, played the clown while spending her days with her male friend, Takeshi. Eventually, they entered middle school and both joined the volleyball club. However, a rift gradually formed between Sakura, blessed with physique and talent, and Takeshi, who was not...

title: You Are The Grand Prize!
overview: One night, Kaori, wearing only her underwear, comes to Sota's room seeking help. Sota is shocked, but it turns out the club members were holding a strip mahjong tournament. With Kaori facing certain defeat, she makes a last-ditch effort to recruit Sota as her substitute player. The tournament's grand prize was... the right to do whatever they wanted with Sota?! Reluctant but needing to protect himself, Sota joins the game. Meanwhile, Kaori seems to have her own thoughts on the matter...
